Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before transitioning to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time required to complete Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed by Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time from the start of a case to the completion of Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Average time between the end of Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the start of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that end with Completed + Resolved and Completed + Closed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes to perform Queued + Awaiting Assignment after an initial Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment in cases where Completed + In Call occurs later in the trace
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between the start of Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the occurrence of Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants containing multiple occurrences of Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call when both appear in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that do not contain any wait states (e.g., Accepted + Wait - Customer, Accepted + Wait - Vendor)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - Customer does not occur

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment when directly followed by Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Average time elapsed between the first and second occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in multi-occurrence variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Total time from case start to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in traces that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment relative to the total cycle time of variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment grouped by product type in cases involving Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of product filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'
